python3 -c '
seqs = {}
with open("/app/sequences.fasta") as fh:
    name = ""
    seq = []
    for line in fh:
        line = line.strip()
        if line.startswith(">"):
            if name: seqs[name] = "".join(seq)
            name = line[1:]
            seq = []
        else:
            seq.append(line)
    if name: seqs[name] = "".join(seq)
i, o = seqs["input"], seqs["output"]
print("input len:", len(i))
print("output len:", len(o))

# Find common prefix
prefix_len = 0
while prefix_len < len(i) and prefix_len < len(o) and i[prefix_len] == o[prefix_len]:
    prefix_len += 1
print("prefix length:", prefix_len)

# Find common suffix
suffix_len = 0
while suffix_len < len(i) and suffix_len < len(o) and i[-(suffix_len+1)] == o[-(suffix_len+1)]:
    suffix_len += 1
print("suffix length:", suffix_len)

print("input diff segment:", i[prefix_len:len(i)-suffix_len])
print("output diff segment:", o[prefix_len:len(o)-suffix_len])
'

input.command:
cat << 'EOF' > /app/design_primers.py
import subprocess
import itertools

def reverse_complement(seq):
    comp = {'a':'t', 'c':'g', 'g':'c', 't':'a', 'A':'T', 'C':'G', 'G':'C', 'T':'A'}
    return "".join(comp.get(base, base) for base in reversed(seq))

def get_tm(seq):
    cmd = ["oligotm", "-tp", "1", "-sc", "1", "-mv", "50", "-dv", "2", "-n", "0.8", "-d", "500", seq]
    res = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
    if res.returncode != 0:
        raise RuntimeError(f"oligotm failed: {res.stderr}")
    try:
        return float(res.stdout.strip())
    except ValueError:
        return 0.0

def read_fasta(f):
    seqs = {}
    with open(f) as fh:
        name = ""
        seq = []
        for line in fh:
            line = line.strip()
            if line.startswith(">"):
                if name: seqs[name] = "".join(seq)
                name = line[1:]
                seq = []
            else:
                seq.append(line)
        if name: seqs[name] = "".join(seq)
    return seqs

seqs = read_fasta("/app/sequences.fasta")
input_seq = seqs["input"]

ins_pos = 215
insertion = "tagattagaagaagaattaagaagaagattaacagaa"

# We want Fwd primer to anneal starting at ins_pos
# and Rev primer to anneal ending at ins_pos (so its 3' end is at ins_pos)

# To add the insertion, we can put it on Fwd's 5' end.
# Fwd primer = insertion + Fwd_anneal
# Rev primer = Rev_anneal

best_pair = None

for l1 in range(15, 46):
    fwd_anneal = input_seq[ins_pos : ins_pos + l1]
    tm1 = get_tm(fwd_anneal)
    
    if not (58 <= tm1 <= 72): continue
    
    for l2 in range(15, 46):
        rev_anneal_target = input_seq[ins_pos - l2 : ins_pos]
        rev_anneal = reverse_complement(rev_anneal_target)
        tm2 = get_tm(rev_anneal)
        
        if not (58 <= tm2 <= 72): continue
        
        if abs(tm1 - tm2) <= 5:
            # We found a valid pair!
            print(f"L1={l1}, L2={l2}, Tm1={tm1:.2f}, Tm2={tm2:.2f}")
            # Fwd primer has insertion at 5' end
            fwd_full = insertion + fwd_anneal
            rev_full = rev_anneal
            
            with open("/app/primers.fasta", "w") as out:
                out.write(f">fwd_primer\n{fwd_full}\n")
                out.write(f">rev_primer\n{rev_full}\n")
            print("Wrote to /app/primers.fasta")
            exit(0)

print("No valid primer pair found.")
exit(1)
EOF

input.command:
python3 -c '
def read_fasta(f):
    seqs = {}
    with open(f) as fh:
        name = ""
        seq = []
        for line in fh:
            line = line.strip()
            if line.startswith(">"):
                if name: seqs[name] = "".join(seq)
                name = line[1:]
                seq = []
            else:
                seq.append(line)
        if name: seqs[name] = "".join(seq)
    return seqs

seqs = read_fasta("/app/sequences.fasta")
i = seqs["input"]
o = seqs["output"]

# find longest common prefix
p = 0
while p < len(i) and p < len(o) and i[p] == o[p]: p += 1

# find longest common suffix
s = 0
while s < len(i) and s < len(o) and i[-(s+1)] == o[-(s+1)]: s += 1

print(f"Prefix match: {p}")
print(f"Suffix match: {s}")

print("Remaining in input:", i[p:len(i)-s])
print("Remaining in output:", o[p:len(o)-s])

if p + s >= len(i):
    overlap = (p + s) - len(i)
    print(f"Overlap: {overlap}")
    ins_start = len(i) - s
    ins_end = p
    print(f"Insertion occurs anywhere between {ins_start} and {ins_end}")
    
    # Let us just pick position p
    ins = o[p:p + len(o) - len(i)]
    print(f"If we insert at position {p}, the insertion is: {ins}")
'

cat << 'EOF' > /app/design_primers2.py
import subprocess

def reverse_complement(seq):
    comp = {'a':'t', 'c':'g', 'g':'c', 't':'a', 'A':'T', 'C':'G', 'G':'C', 'T':'A'}
    return "".join(comp.get(base, base) for base in reversed(seq))

def get_tm(seq):
    cmd = ["oligotm", "-tp", "1", "-sc", "1", "-mv", "50", "-dv", "2", "-n", "0.8", "-d", "500", seq]
    res = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
    if res.returncode != 0:
        raise RuntimeError(f"oligotm failed: {res.stderr}")
    return float(res.stdout.strip())

def read_fasta(f):
    seqs = {}
    with open(f) as fh:
        name = ""
        seq = []
        for line in fh:
            line = line.strip()
            if line.startswith(">"):
                if name: seqs[name] = "".join(seq)
                name = line[1:]
                seq = []
            else:
                seq.append(line)
        if name: seqs[name] = "".join(seq)
    return seqs

seqs = read_fasta("/app/sequences.fasta")
i = seqs["input"]
o = seqs["output"]

p = 0
while p < len(i) and p < len(o) and i[p] == o[p]: p += 1

s = 0
while s < len(i) and s < len(o) and i[-(s+1)] == o[-(s+1)]: s += 1

# Let's insert at index p
ins_pos = p
insertion = o[p : p + len(o) - len(i)]

print(f"Insertion position: {ins_pos}")
print(f"Insertion sequence: {insertion}")

# We want Fwd primer to anneal starting at ins_pos
# and Rev primer to anneal ending at ins_pos

valid_pairs = []

for l1 in range(15, 46):
    fwd_anneal = i[ins_pos : ins_pos + l1]
    tm1 = get_tm(fwd_anneal)
    if not (58 <= tm1 <= 72): continue
    
    for l2 in range(15, 46):
        rev_anneal_target = i[ins_pos - l2 : ins_pos]
        rev_anneal = reverse_complement(rev_anneal_target)
        tm2 = get_tm(rev_anneal)
        
        if not (58 <= tm2 <= 72): continue
        
        if abs(tm1 - tm2) <= 5:
            valid_pairs.append((l1, l2, tm1, tm2, fwd_anneal, rev_anneal))

if not valid_pairs:
    print("No valid primer pairs found.")
    exit(1)

# Pick a reasonable pair, e.g., closest Tm
valid_pairs.sort(key=lambda x: abs(x[2] - x[3]))
best = valid_pairs[0]

l1, l2, tm1, tm2, fwd_anneal, rev_anneal = best
print(f"Selected L1={l1}, L2={l2}, Tm1={tm1:.2f}, Tm2={tm2:.2f}")

fwd_full = insertion + fwd_anneal
rev_full = rev_anneal

with open("/app/primers.fasta", "w") as out:
    out.write(f">fwd_primer\n{fwd_full}\n")
    out.write(f">rev_primer\n{rev_full}\n")
print("Wrote to /app/primers.fasta")
EOF

    lines = [l.strip() for l in f.readlines()]
fwd = lines[1]
rev = lines[3]
fwd_anneal = fwd[-15:] # since we know it is 15 bases
print("Fwd anneal:", fwd_anneal)
cmd = ["oligotm", "-tp", "1", "-sc", "1", "-mv", "50", "-dv", "2", "-n", "0.8", "-d", "500", fwd_anneal]

print("Rev anneal:", rev)
cmd = ["oligotm", "-tp", "1", "-sc", "1", "-mv", "50", "-dv", "2", "-n", "0.8", "-d", "500", rev]

import subprocess
def get_tm(seq):
    cmd = ["oligotm", "-tp", "1", "-sc", "1", "-mv", "50", "-dv", "2", "-n", "0.8", "-d", "500", seq]
    res = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
    return float(res.stdout.strip())
def reverse_complement(seq):
    comp = {"a":"t", "c":"g", "g":"c", "t":"a", "A":"T", "C":"G", "G":"C", "T":"A"}
    return "".join(comp.get(base, base) for base in reversed(seq))
def read_fasta(f):
    seqs = {}
    with open(f) as fh:
        name = ""
        seq = []
        for line in fh:
            line = line.strip()
            if line.startswith(">"):
                if name: seqs[name] = "".join(seq)
                name = line[1:]
                seq = []
            else:
                seq.append(line)
        if name: seqs[name] = "".join(seq)
    return seqs

seqs = read_fasta("/app/sequences.fasta")
i = seqs["input"]
o = seqs["output"]

ins_pos = 215
insertion = o[ins_pos : ins_pos + 39]

l1 = 16
l2 = 34

fwd_anneal = i[ins_pos : ins_pos + l1]
rev_anneal_target = i[ins_pos - l2 : ins_pos]
rev_anneal = reverse_complement(rev_anneal_target)

print("Tm Fwd anneal:", get_tm(fwd_anneal))
print("Tm Rev anneal:", get_tm(rev_anneal))

fwd_full = insertion + fwd_anneal
rev_full = rev_anneal

with open("/app/primers.fasta", "w") as f:
    f.write(f">fwd_primer\n{fwd_full}\n>rev_primer\n{rev_full}\n")
'
